title: Depths of the Prime Heart
summary: After defeating the Stormheart Entity, the player descends into the Convergence Depths, a region where Dream and Core energy collapse into a single, pulsing reality. The Prime Heart’s whispers echo through the void, calling the player by name. The player must navigate the Depths, confront Heart‑Shades of past Codeborn, and reach the Heart’s Veil — the final barrier before the Prime Heart’s domain.
